title: heliophila pectinata
intro: Heliophila pectinata, also known as the native or rough heliophila, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Heliophila pectinata include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Heliophila pectinata is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or topical cream, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
